Important Notices

  • Completion of this programme does not constitute an employment offer or guarantee of employment by CRAVELLE sp. z o.o. or any partner organisation.
  • The certificate is issued by CRAVELLE sp. z o.o. and does not represent an accredited academic qualification. Recognition by third-party institutions is at their discretion.
  • Programme content, schedules, and instructors may be updated without prior notice.
  • Academic credit transfer is at the sole discretion of the receiving institution.
  • Payment is not currently enabled. This feature is coming soon.
